title: Bedrock Mods
description:
This mod, which has never been seen before in Minecraft, shows how to produce bedrock.,

Thanks to mod, tools and equipment can be made from bedrock.
body:
![uyuj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c79f622aa930be644c095807cc569f780e8a66.png)
![hjgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff630871f8b04253baa0399f8a5116926f716b8_0.webp)
[![dfdscfsd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf44c11a8b7ff364632ccde2bcfac4e72131ca2d_0.webp)](https://mcreator.net/)
[![jhgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e03629e989e9744138963451f8877bb5d65aceea.png)](https://discord.gg/j6B8wyYTrk)
[![jhgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59902fedac100ce3cc3249dc677e76281aa597d0.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedrock-tool)
[![jhgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325f9129543a47168e4871ad996bba93a4bf82c1_0.webp)](https://neoforged.net/)
[![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df5ae65196aa7a4a0aef20e208c0005ff06471f.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/interesting-mods)






![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df61c322385d046a8b0c8315e19b365ab064adc3.png)

 The bedrock block, which is impossible to break in Minecraft, has 
 been processed in the game and made usable.
- Items, armour and weapons have been brought from bedrock
- Bedrock dust is created, and from that we obtain a piece of bedrock.
- If a sword is made from bedrock, that sword will kill a ender dragon in 2 or 3 hits.
- If a pickaxe is crafted from bedrock, only that pickaxe can break bedrock.
